name: Claude Code Log Cleanup
description: Housekeeping companion for the scheduled Claude runs: delete run logs/digests older than a cutoff so they do not pile up. Read-nothing, deletes only matching files in one folder.

parameters.label: Log folder
parameters.help: Folder holding the Claude run logs to prune.

parameters.label: File filter
parameters.help: Which files to consider, e.g. claude-*.log or *.md.

parameters.label: Keep for (days)
parameters.help: Delete matching files older than this many days.
